description: Engram Tier-1 enforcement hooks for Claude Code. SessionStart injects a brain-first orientation block; PreToolUse(Bash) blocks git pushes to protected branches without a complete QA record, commits carrying AI-authorship trailers, and staging of secret files; PreToolUse(Edit|Write) injects a money-path lock/idempotency/ledger checklist for configured money paths (non-blocking); PostToolUse(Task|Agent) logs sub-agent spawns to an append-only JSONL (non-blocking); Stop emits a non-blocking verify-before-done nudge. Pure Python 3 stdlib; config from engram.hooks.json with built-in defaults.
